_comment: Fiat 500e / Abarth 500e (2020+ new platform, Stellantis). Derived from a Car Scanner adapter log 2026-07-13 (VIN ZFAEFA265R...). Bus: ISO 15765-4 CAN 29-bit 500k (ATSP7, ATCP18). SoC source: DID 0x019E on ECU 0x42 (req 18DA42F1, resp 18DAF142) — displayed SoC, scale x0.1%. Verified live: 0x0358 = 85.6% and decaying while awake. NOTE: polling keeps the car awake (DC-DC on, ~0.4%/25min HV drain) — poll sparsely when not charging.

parameters.name: soh_capacity_ah
parameters._comment: current capacity ~117.6Ah vs 120.0Ah new -> SoH ~98%. Byte offsets to verify on first live read.
